nasb.text: Woe to those who enact evil statutes And to those who constantly record unjust decisions,

esv.text: Woe to those who decree iniquitous decrees, and the writers who keep writing oppression,

cnv.text: 那些制定奸惡律例的， 和那些記錄詭詐判語的，有禍了！

ccb.text: 制定不义律例、起草不公法令的人啊， 你们有祸了！

csbs.text: 祸哉！那些制定邪恶律例、 记录不义判决的！
